assignments.value: 1. What is Freshly?  Freshly is a Pakistani skincare and beauty brand dedicated to providing affordable, high-quality products that help you achieve naturally healthy and glowing skin.  Our Tagline: "Your Skin. Your Fresh Start."  2. What products do you offer?  We currently offer a range of skincare products, including:  Haldi Chandan Crystal Glow Bleach Cream with Serum Skin Polish Multani Mitti Face Pack Black Peel-Off Mask Acne and blemish care products Glow-enhancing skincare solutions  We are continuously expanding our product range to meet your skincare needs.  3. Are your products suitable for all skin types?  Most of our products are designed to work for normal, oily, combination, and dry skin. However, if you have highly sensitive skin, we recommend performing a patch test before full application.  4. Are your products original?  Yes. All Freshly products are carefully manufactured and quality-checked before being delivered to customers.  5. How do I place an order?  Simply:  Visit our website. Browse your favorite products. Add them to your cart. Proceed to checkout. Enter your shipping details and confirm your order. 6. Which payment methods do you accept?  We currently support:  Cash on Delivery (COD) Online Bank Transfer (if available) Other payment options may be added in the future. 7. Do you deliver all over Pakistan?  Yes, we deliver nationwide across Pakistan.  8. How long does delivery take? Order Processing Time:  1–2 business days  Estimated Delivery Time: Major cities: 2–4 business days Remote areas: 3–7 business days  Delivery times may vary during holidays or due to courier delays.  9. How much is the shipping fee?  Shipping charges are calculated during checkout and may vary depending on your location and current promotional offers.  10. Can I cancel my order?  Yes. You can request cancellation before your order has been dispatched.  Please contact our support team as soon as possible.  11. What is your return policy?  We offer a 7-day return window.  You may request a return if:  You received the wrong product. The product arrived damaged. The item has a manufacturing defect.  The product should be unused and returned in its original packaging.  12. Can I exchange a product?  Yes, exchanges are available for eligible products within our 7-day return period, subject to verification.  13. What should I do if I receive a damaged parcel?  Please contact us immediately and provide:  Your order number. Photos of the parcel and product. A brief description of the issue.  Our support team will help resolve the matter promptly.  14. How can I track my order?  Once your order is shipped, you may receive tracking information through our communication channels, depending on the courier service used.  15. Are your skincare products safe?  Our products are formulated for general cosmetic use. However, everyone's skin is different, so we always recommend performing a patch test before first use.  16. Can your products permanently cure skin problems?  No cosmetic product can guarantee a permanent cure for medical skin conditions. Our products are intended to support your skincare routine and improve the appearance of your skin.  17. How often should I use your skincare products?  Usage instructions vary by product. Please follow the directions provided on the product packaging or description page.  18. Do you provide skincare advice?  Yes. We regularly share skincare tips, educational content, and beauty guidance through our social media platforms to help customers build better skincare routines.  19. Is my personal information secure?  Yes. We value your privacy and use your information only for processing orders, customer support, and improving your shopping experience.  We do not sell your personal information to third parties.  20. How can I contact Freshly? Customer Support Email:  freshlycream@gmail.com  You can also reach us through our official social media pages for product inquiries and order assistance.  21. Do you offer discounts or promotions?  Yes! We occasionally run special offers, seasonal discounts, and promotional campaigns. Follow our social media pages and website to stay updated.  22. Why should I choose Freshly?  ✔ Affordable skincare products. ✔ Carefully selected beauty solutions. ✔ Nationwide delivery across Pakistan. ✔ 7-day return policy. ✔ Fast order processing (1–2 days). ✔ Customer-focused support. ✔ A mission to make quality skincare accessible for everyone.  Need More Help?  If you have any questions that aren't covered here, feel free to contact us at:  Email: freshlycream@gmail.com  Freshly — Your Skin. Your Fresh Start.
